name: RRM Academy Ecosystem
staleness_note: Row counts, financial summaries, and timeline drift over time. This document is the system-wide SSOT -- update when infrastructure changes, subsystems ship, or pipelines migrate. Row counts are approximate snapshots; query D1 for authoritative values.

organization.name: RRM Academy
organization.mission: Online education platform for restorative reproductive medicine

rrm-auth.purpose: Users, sessions, enrollments, community, CRM, billing, FAQs, blog, glossary, practitioners, newsletter

rrm-library.purpose: Research library articles, knowledge base, article bodies, verified facts, relationships

rrm-survey.purpose: Survey pseudonymization (email + Airtable record ID + token-claim atomicity)

rrm-assets.purpose: Community uploads, blog images, course covers, source material PDFs

MARKETING_INTEL_KV.purpose: Marketing intelligence snapshots, broken link deltas

SURVEY_TOKENS.purpose: Endo survey magic-link tokens + email rate-limit reverse lookups
keys: token:{uuid} -> { email, created, used, userorigin, utmSource }

datasets: worker_events (CF Pages Functions, hyphen not allowed in binding)
analytics_engine.schema: blobs[worker, event, action, status, detail], doubles[duration, count, httpStatus], indexes[action]
analytics_engine.gotcha: writeDataPoint() returns void -- never wrap in waitUntil() in Pages Functions

vectorize.purpose: Semantic search for library, blog, FAQs, courses (half of the fusion system; see search_system)
vectorize.refresh_local: npm run embed (scripts/embed-library.mjs, uses Worker bindings via wrangler dev --remote)
vectorize.refresh_ci: scripts/embed-library-ci.mjs (REST API, production-ready but NOT yet wired into deploy.yml)
vectorize.metadata_constraint: No null values -- filter nulls before upsert
vectorize.note: Manual refresh after data-heavy changes (bulk enrichment, new content types). ~100s for 3,200+ entries

ai_search.purpose: Conversational research layer powering /ask page + replacement for Vectorize semantic search
ai_search.retrieval: Hybrid (BM25 keyword + vector) within the AI Search namespace

rrm-academy-search-articles.loaded_by: scripts/ai-search-corpus-upload.mjs (CI on every Pages deploy + Sunday 08:00 UTC reconcile cron)

rrm-academy-search-site.status: DISABLED at Worker level — produced duplicate hits (every D1 article appeared once as upload + once as crawl)

consumer_worker.name: rrm-ai-search
consumer_worker.purpose: Owns ai_search_namespaces binding (CF Pages Functions cannot bind it directly). Pages calls via service binding.
bindings: AUTH_DB (D1 rrm-auth — citation title lookups for posts/faq/glossary_term)
LIBRARY_DB (D1 rrm-library — citation title lookups for articles)
consumer_worker.auth: Bearer AI_SEARCH_WORKER_AUTH (shared secret on Pages env + Worker secret)

feature_flag.fail_closed: _middleware.js defaults to 'off' on KV read failure

deprecated_v1.status: DEPRECATED 2026-04-28; retained behind feature flag for emergency revert
deprecated_v1.retirement_target: 2026-05-12 (after 2-week soak); drops NLWEB_SEARCH_URL secret + deletes AutoRAG instance + decommissions Vectorize index rrm-library-vectors

ai_search.signup_flow: New signups from /ask tracked via user.signup_source='ask'; welcome-ask email sent inline

ses.dkim_spf_dmarc: All configured; custom MAIL FROM isolates bounces

sender_addresses.accounts@: Auth, verification, password reset, billing, enrollment

ga4.purpose: Server-side pageviews + conversions via Measurement Protocol from _middleware.js

data_api_access.method: OAuth refresh-token (NOT ADC, NOT service account)

measurement_protocol.credential: op://Automation/GA4 RRM Academy (Cloudflare)/credential (api_secret in password field)
measurement_protocol.client_id_strategy: deterministic hash of IP + User-Agent (no cookies)

search_console.access: ADC with webmasters scope; query via curl + x-goog-user-project: rrm-academy

calendar.note: Workspace policy blocks OAuth client re-auth + SA keys; impersonation bypasses both

down_detector.does: Checks site health, Telegram alert on failure

user.purpose: Site accounts (login, password, Stripe link, role, signup_source)

contact.purpose: CRM umbrella -- anyone who touched RRM Academy

contact_tag.purpose: Tags on contacts (source, behavior, segment, elv:* validation)

newsletter_subscriber.purpose: Newsletter list with segments, status, engagement tracking

practitioner.purpose: Provider directory records (21 sources consolidated, NPI+Healthgrades+Perplexity verified)
practitioner.badge_system: 21 badges across 5 groups (action, type-clinical, type-wellness, type-educational, entity, context, trust)
practitioner.live_status: pre-deploy (dev preview at /dev/providers, password-gated, noindex). Production target /providers/

password_reset.note: Token hashed in DB; unhashed token sent in email link

user_label.purpose: Tier badges and achievement labels (STUC tiers, course completions)
stuc_labels: Save the Uterus Club 🏷️ (grandfathered from Wix)
achievement_labels: Restorative Reproductive Medicine (RRM) vs Standard ART
Postpartum Depression & Anxiety: a restorative approach

enrollment.purpose: Course enrollments with payment and revocation tracking

community_post.access_control: requireMember() gate; announcement/event/resource = staff-only; members+masterclass channels read-only for non-admin

glossary_abbreviation.purpose: Glossary abbreviation quick-reference; term_slug optionally links to a glossary_term

webhook_event.purpose: Stripe webhook dedup (event_id). INSERT OR IGNORE on retry. Deletes only on 5xx (transient), not 4xx (permanent).

affiliate_clicks.purpose: Affiliate link click tracking (logged-in user clicks to partner sites)

email_log.purpose: Audit trail for all sent email

newsletter_send.purpose: Bulk send records with delivery metrics
newsletter_send.commentary_slug: Optional column linking RSS-triggered sends to a post

newsletter_event.purpose: Per-subscriber send events (opens, clicks, bounces, complaints)

rrm-library.purpose: Research library (3,200+ articles), guardrails, voice profiles, and verified facts

facts.purpose: Verified claims with provenance. Consumed by /check-facts; written via /promote-facts (admin scope).
facts.wave_1_status: COMPLETE -- 782 Hilgers facts from NaProTECHNOLOGY textbook promoted and linked

relationships.purpose: Content relationships (cites, supports, extracted_from facts->articles, etc.)

definition.contact: Anyone who touches Brian, Naomi, or RRM Academy in any way -- donors, conference contacts, emailers, website visitors, account holders or not
definition.user: A contact who has a digital relationship with the site -- created an account, bought a course, donated via Stripe, etc.
definition.member: A user with active STUC membership (Stripe subscription OR grandfathered label OR staff role)
definition.student: A user with one or more course enrollments
definition.donor: A contact who has donated (tracked in contact.total_donated; stale, see gaps)
definition.subscriber: A contact on the newsletter list (newsletter_subscriber table)

linking.contact_to_user: contact.user_id -> user.id (optional FK). Many contacts have no user. Match on email when FK missing.
linking.user_to_newsletter: newsletter_subscriber.user_id -> user.id (optional FK). Also matchable on email.

source_of_truth.stuc_membership_active: Stripe subscriptions API (status in active/trialing/past_due) OR user_label 'Save the Uterus Club 🏷️' (grandfathered) OR user.role >= mod (staff). Gated via requireMember() in community/_shared.js.
source_of_truth.stuc_tier: Stripe price ID mapped to env vars (STRIPE_PRICE_MEMBER/HERO/SUPERHERO). Grandfathered = member tier. Staff = staff tier. Default if price missing: member.
source_of_truth.stuc_cancellation: Stripe webhook customer.subscription.deleted fires email but does NOT write to D1. Gap: no D1 record of cancellation date or reason.
source_of_truth.course_enrollment: D1 enrollment table. revoked_at for refunded.
source_of_truth.newsletter_status: D1 newsletter_subscriber.status (active/unsubscribed/bounced/complained); also mirrored in user.newsletter_opt_in (0/1)
source_of_truth.donation_history: Stripe API (live charges + subscriptions). D1 contact.total_donated exists but is NOT maintained by webhooks -- stale.
source_of_truth.email_validity: contact_tag with elv:* tags from EmailListVerify

known_gaps: STUC cancellations not recorded in D1 -- only Stripe webhook log + email sent
contact.total_donated not synced from Stripe webhooks -- stale
Wix legacy data (groups, labels) is unreliable -- do not use as source of truth
PayPal donations sync only via n8n Airtable automation, not to D1
No unified 'person profile' view joining all tables

everything_about_a_person_by_email: SELECT * FROM contact WHERE email = ? COLLATE NOCASE
SELECT * FROM [user] WHERE email = ? COLLATE NOCASE
SELECT * FROM newsletter_subscriber WHERE email = ? COLLATE NOCASE
SELECT ul.* FROM user_label ul JOIN [user] u ON ul.user_id = u.id WHERE u.email = ? COLLATE NOCASE
SELECT e.* FROM enrollment e JOIN [user] u ON e.user_id = u.id WHERE u.email = ? COLLATE NOCASE
SELECT ct.* FROM contact_tag ct JOIN contact c ON ct.contact_id = c.id WHERE c.email = ? COLLATE NOCASE
-- Then query Stripe: stripe.subscriptions.list({ customer: user.stripe_customer_id })
all_stuc_members: -- Active Stripe subscribers (requires Stripe API call per user with stripe_customer_id)
-- Grandfathered: SELECT u.* FROM [user] u JOIN user_label ul ON u.id = ul.user_id WHERE ul.label = 'Save the Uterus Club 🏷️'
-- Staff: SELECT * FROM [user] WHERE role IN ('mod', 'admin', 'superadmin')
-- Note: requireMember() in community/_shared.js implements this logic
lookup_recipes.all_course_students: SELECT u.email, u.name, e.course_id, e.enrolled_at, e.completed_at, e.revoked_at FROM enrollment e JOIN [user] u ON e.user_id = u.id WHERE e.revoked_at IS NULL
lookup_recipes.contact_without_account: SELECT c.* FROM contact c WHERE c.user_id IS NULL

push_to_main.does: Astro build only (no data fetch, no citation verification)

repository_dispatch_article.does: Fetch single article from library worker, build

repository_dispatch_blog.does: Fetch single blog post, build (citation verify on single-record, blocking)

repository_dispatch_course.does: Fetch single course from D1, build. Added 2026-04-26 (Step 6).

workflow_dispatch.does: Full fetch-all (articles, posts, FAQs, courses, glossary), build. Citation verify runs but continue-on-error.

courses.from: GET /api/courses (D1 rrm-auth: course + course_section + course_step) + src/data/courses-overrides.json (affiliate courses)
courses.process: Fetch published courses from /api/courses (full or single-record) -> filter overrides + sort D1 by sortOrder -> merge courses-overrides.json (idempotent, honors _position field) -> atomic write via .tmp + rename. Endpoint-down resilience: 5xx after retries -> log + exit 0 with courses.json untouched.
courses.soak_through: 2026-05-03 (cleanup mostly executed early on 2026-04-27 per Brian)
courses.critical_note: NeoFertility Medical Training Cohort lives ONLY in overrides.json (no D1 record). Without the merge step, every cache-miss deploy silently 404s /courses/neofertility-medical-training/. Migration script's --check-fk validates 6 course_id + 3 step_id reference tables.
courses.authoring: 17 admin endpoints under functions/api/admin/courses/* (session + admin role). MANDATORY: route ALL course edits through /courses-update skill at ~/.claude/skills/courses-update/SKILL.md. Migration script (scripts/migrate-courses-to-d1.mjs) is one-shot seed only -- requires --seed-mode-i-understand flag and clobbers admin-edited status.
courses.cleanup_executed_2026_04_27: AIRTABLE_PAT + TINIFY_API_KEY + AIRTABLE_WEBHOOK_URL dropped from deploy.yml. Pending: untrack src/data/courses.json from git, archive Airtable base app0nohI0WrgFWOE3.

absolute_floor._purpose: Count below floor fails immediately regardless of baseline ratchet -- prevents slow cumulative data loss across consecutive deploys.

guards.type_check_baseline: scripts/type-check-baseline.json (Astro check errors ceiling, NOT auto-updated; bump via node scripts/check-types.mjs --update)
guards.citation_verification: scripts/verify-citations.mjs v2 (multi-API cascade) -- blocks single-record blog dispatch, continue-on-error on full deploy

deploy_pipelines.permissions_required: contents: write (for baseline auto-commit). WORKFLOWS_PAT secret required for any .github/workflows/*.yml change to auto-merge (default GITHUB_TOKEN cannot push workflow files); bootstrapped via PR #8 on 2026-04-26.

pillar_guides.architecture_decision: 2026-03-12: flat URLs at root for SEO authority; /guides/ is an index page, not a URL parent

live.note: Present with breadcrumb but currently absent from /guides/ index cards -- UX gap

index_page.purpose: Lists and links all pillar guides (not a URL parent)

affiliate_system.purpose: Externally-hosted partner courses -- no Stripe, click-through to partner

routing.enrollment_click: POST /api/courses/affiliate-click (logs to affiliate_clicks table, redirects to affiliateUrl)
routing.build_merge: src/lib/fetch-courses-data.mjs merges courses-overrides.json after D1 fetch (load-bearing). Cutover from Airtable: 2026-04-26.

source_files: src/styles/global.css (CSS tokens: 3 themes × 73 tokens + 19 shared = 238 total)

ci_gates.name: Phantom token audit
ci_gates.purpose: Fail if any var(--X) references undefined tokens

brand.wordmark: RRM Academy in Cormorant Garamond 600, text-only (no graphic mark or icon)
brand.accent_color: --accent (#725e7e light / #b8a3c4 dark / #5a5045 eink) -- purple, never rose
brand.accent_philosophy: Purple as authority, used sparingly (links, buttons, interactive states)
brand.dark_asset_palette: --footer-bg (#313131) + --footer-accent (#c9b8d3) for branded assets in dark contexts

entry_points.DESIGN.md: Human entry point (tells where to read/edit)

design_system.deprecated: docs/design/tokens.json (older static snapshot, no longer consumed)

editorial_system.overview: Voice-gated copywriting agents per brand. Proof gates are deterministic (grep/quote/read), not claim-based.

gianna.persona: Dr. Naomi Whittaker, MD, OBGYN, MIGS, NFPMC, FCI
gianna.pipeline: D1 posts table -> editorial review -> Gianna voice gate -> publish -> /commentary/

patrick.persona: Dr. Phil Boyle, MICGP MRCGP, founder NeoFertility, president IIRRM

governance.brand_separation: Gianna and Patrick are mutually exclusive. NeoFertility content must route through Patrick for voice approval.
governance.proof_gate_framework: Deterministic quote/grep/read checks. No claim-based self-assessment.
governance.voice_profile_storage: External .md files, updated independently of agent definitions.

fact_system.purpose: Guardrail checking + verified-fact claim matching for all RRM content

storage.facts_table: databases.rrm-library.tables.facts (~6,883 rows, verified >= 1, post Phase 1 Tier A author corpus closeout 2026-04-26)

POST /check.purpose: Validate text against guardrails (returns triggered guardrails)
POST /check.logic: Query knowledge WHERE type='guardrail' AND is_active=1; extract trigger terms; case-insensitive match

POST /check-facts.purpose: Verify claims in text against verified facts
POST /check-facts.logic: Extract claims (percentages, dollars, sample sizes, cohort years); numeric match ±2% tolerance; common-error phrase matching

local_mirror.local_fact_count: ~162 (expanded 2026-03-28 from deep extraction of 13 IIRRM outcome papers + HFEA/ESHRE data)

wave_status.wave_1: COMPLETE -- 782 Hilgers facts (NaProTECHNOLOGY textbook) promoted and linked
wave_status.phase_1_tier_a_author_corpus: COMPLETE 2026-04-26 -- 9 authors, 181 articles, 2,108 new facts (Stanford 1112, Prior 370, Fehring 157, Vigil 150, Yeung 104, Billings 87, Boyle 65, Mirkes 34, Redwine 29)
wave_status.phase_2_tier_b_fulltext: PENDING -- ~261 articles missing fulltext (Hilgers 188, Prior 110, Stanford 38, Fehring 47, others)
wave_status.phase_3_dedup_admin_ui: PENDING -- 2,515 open author_dedup_flags blocking Tier 2 author hub pages

audit.purpose: Per-author Tier A/B work-queue generator. Splits articles into facts-ready (Tier A) and fulltext-needed (Tier B). Outputs CSVs to scripts/out/ (gitignored).

extract.purpose: D1-sourced journal-article fact orchestrator. Reads article body from D1 article_bodies, dispatches Opus 4.7 high-effort via `claude -p`, validates output against FPG-1..6 + tradition allowlist + enum allowlists.
extract.sibling: scripts/extract-chapter-facts.mjs (textbook chapter variant, source body from rrm-cli SQLite)

promote.purpose: POSTs staged facts to rrm-library-worker /promote-facts in batches with retry/backoff. Idempotent upsert via PRIMARY KEY id.

ssot_build.purpose: Reads D1 facts, filters by entity tradition matcher, writes 5 canonical-facts JSONs (naprotechnology, rrm, creighton, neofertility, femm). Preserves _manual editorial overrides. Aborts on >5% record_count drop unless --force.

proof_gates.purpose: 5 deterministic gates that prevent the bug classes /arise --deep found 2026-04-26 (commit 70958c2 -- Creighton matcher dropped 724 facts, promote-* silent on partial failure, validator-prompt enum drift). Each gate has binary pass/fail semantics, no LLM judgment.

gates.G1: Schema self-consistency -- entity matchers in canonical-facts-schema.mjs ref only ALLOWED_TRADITIONS values; slug-named traditions accepted by their entity; every ALLOWED_TRADITIONS value routes to >=1 entity
gates.G2: SSOT integrity -- record_count match, 4 fact-id pattern allowlist (article rec, chapter slug, legacy curator, registry), tradition validity, entity matcher routing
gates.G3: Validator-prompt enum sync -- ALLOWED_CATEGORIES + ALLOWED_CLAIM_TYPES Sets match enums declared in system-prompt.md
gates.G4: Orchestrator exit codes -- every script with failed/failures array calls process.exit(non-zero) inside the failure block (static check)
gates.G5: D1<->SSOT reconciliation -- D1 fact count per entity matches SSOT _meta.record_count within +/-2 tolerance (network-dependent; --quick skips)

wired_into.pre_commit_hook: .git/hooks/pre-commit (auto-fires on changes to canonical-facts-schema.mjs, extract-*-facts.mjs, promote-*-facts.mjs, build-canonical-facts.mjs, system-prompt.md)

proof_gates.shipped: 2026-04-26 (commit c47731c). Caught 2 latent bugs on first run: stranded conventional + billings traditions (G1), missing process.exit on promote-* failure (G4). Both fixed in same commit.

fact_system.citation_integrity: Blog deploy blocked by scripts/verify-citations.mjs v2 (multi-API cascade). Never insert citations from model knowledge -- always live research.

search_system.architecture: Pagefind (client-side full-text, instant) merged with semantic results from /api/search/semantic via Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) in src/components/SearchBar.astro. As of 2026-04-28 the semantic backend is the rrm-ai-search Worker (hybrid BM25+vector against AI Search namespace rrm-academy-search). Pre-2026-04-28 it was Vectorize index rrm-library-vectors.

fusion.formula: sum(1/(K+rank)) across Pagefind + semantic + recency + relevance signals
fusion.late_arrival_handling: Append semantic results as addenda if they arrive after Pagefind

search_system.dedup: By URL (normalized to path) + record ID (slug-rename resilient)

api.rate_limit_purpose: Protect billed Workers AI + AI Search query calls
api.response_shape: { results: [{ url, title, type, score, authors, year }] }
api.routing: v1/v2 branch on context.data.searchV2 from _middleware.js (KV feature:search_v2). v2 path forwards to rrm-ai-search Worker via service binding; v1 falls back to Vectorize. Anonymous + tier=admin still v1 until full rollout.

ci_steps: .github/workflows/deploy.yml — corpus upload runs after Pages deploy on every push (continue-on-error: true, ::warning:: annotation)
v2_pipeline.key_to_title_lookup: rrm-ai-search Worker resolves citation titles via D1: 2-layer batched lookup. Direct slug→title per source table (articles/posts/faq.question/glossary_term.name); fallback through ai_search_docs.full_slug for sha8-truncated keys.

local.trigger: npm run embed (wrangler dev --remote + Worker bindings)

newsletter_system.description: Transactional email list for research commentary and course updates (distinct from transactional SES email)

unsubscribe_flow.policy: UPDATE status='unsubscribed' + UPDATE user.newsletter_opt_in = 0. NEVER DELETE (CAN-SPAM).

send_flow.suppression_safety_net: Queries elv:* blocked tags before send

scripts.verify-crm-elv.mjs: Bulk SMTP-level mailbox verification, tags contacts
scripts.segment-newsletter.mjs: Populate segments column from contact_tag + enrollment + Stripe data

auth_system.model: Custom auth (no third-party identity provider). PBKDF2 password hashing. Session cookies in D1.

account_linking_cascade: 2. Hit by email on verified account -> link (set google_id)
3. Hit by email on unverified account -> auto-upgrade (set email_verified=1)
4. No match -> create new user with email_verified=1

rate_limiting.scope: Per CF Pages isolate (resets on cold start)

api_endpoints.POST /api/survey/submit: Store results in Airtable + D1, strip email from KV
api_endpoints.POST /api/survey/event: Beacon tracking (calculate, download_pdf, copy_for_ai, follow_instagram) -> Analytics Engine

pseudonymization.airtable: Symptoms, scores, metadata (no email). Base appb7HeeJQsVe3Jpr, table tblMAw2tih2ie3ZCu
pseudonymization.kv_survey_tokens: Token -> email mapping, stripped after submit

endo_survey_system.failure_handling: D1 insert failure logs to Analytics Engine + sends SES alert to administrator@rrmacademy.org (async waitUntil)

stripe.ga4_event: purchase (fired at checkout creation, not thank-you confirmation)

paypal.integration: Hardcoded link on /donate page; no API integration
paypal.sync: Manual via n8n PayPal -> Airtable workflow (monthly 5th)

donations_system.known_gap: contact.total_donated NOT synced from Stripe webhooks. Stripe API is SSOT; D1 column decays over time.

rrm-router.purpose: Edge reverse proxy (Astro vs Wix strangler fig). Runs BEFORE CF Pages middleware.

crons: Saturday 6AM UTC (0 6 * * 6): metadata verify tick (100 records/week via CrossRef)
endpoints: /ingest (accepts recXXX or UUID format for deterministic id)
/link-fulltext (canonical -- handles PDF + MD + article_bodies; supports ?prefix= for custom R2 prefix)

endpoint_scopes.admin (rrm_admin_): all endpoints including promote-facts, integrity, ingest, classify-result, insights-result, annotate, learn, link-fulltext, link-pdf, normalize-abstracts, bodies (POST)

rrm-library-worker.legacy_note: WORKER_AUTH_TOKEN fully removed 2026-04-03; all consumers on scoped tokens

rrm-observatory.purpose: AE queries, alerts, daily/weekly Telegram digests

rrm-mcp.purpose: MCP server for Naomi's Perplexity (5 tools, API key auth, AE telemetry)

google_workspace_automation.description: Programmatic access to Google Calendar + Meet for the rrmacademy.org Workspace tenant. Uses service-account impersonation via DWD (admin.google.com) — bypasses the OAuth-client and SA-key-creation policy blocks.

service_account.iam_binding: administrator@rrmacademy.org has roles/iam.serviceAccountTokenCreator on the SA

token_minting.method: signJwt + JWT-bearer grant (no SA key file)

save_the_uterus_club_meetings.purpose: STUC monthly live calls (Uterus Allies Call series)

neofertility_email_security.purpose: DMARC ramp + email security workstream events
neofertility_email_security.data_owner: service account (shared with admin via ACL)

stuc_event_canonical.description: Canonical Google Meet space configuration for every STUC event. Set at space creation via Meet REST API v2 (POST /v2/spaces) BEFORE attaching to a Calendar event via conferenceData.conferenceId. Replaces the Calendar createRequest path so settings are correct from the first join.
stuc_event_canonical.workspace_tier_required: Business Standard or above (programmatic recording requirement)

ui_only_no_api.note: These match Brian's STUC defaults but are NOT exposed by Meet REST API v2 as of 2026-04-29. They must be set per-host-account in the Meet UI Host Settings, or rely on Google's account-level defaults that Brian has already configured.
ui_only_no_api.host_management: ON (already on at the org/account level)
ui_only_no_api.waiting_room_message: Please wait until a meeting host brings you into the call

stuc_event_canonical.lockable_via_admin_console: Some of the ui_only_no_api settings can be enforced as Workspace policy at admin.google.com -> Apps -> Google Workspace -> Settings for Google Meet (org-wide defaults). Recommended for STUC: lock recording=ON, transcription=ON, smart-notes=ON, attendance-report=ON at the OU level so they apply to every meeting Brian creates.

create_event_pattern.summary: Replaces the legacy Calendar createRequest path so Meet settings are correct from creation.
steps: 2. POST https://meet.googleapis.com/v2/spaces with the meet_defaults.stuc_event_canonical.api_settable.config payload -> response includes meetingCode + meetingUri + phoneAccess
3. POST https://www.googleapis.com/calendar/v3/calendars/<CAL_ID>/events?conferenceDataVersion=1 with conferenceData.conferenceId = the meetingCode (NOT createRequest)
5. Persist Meet link to D1 community_post.event_link + content

first_end_to_end.event: How Disconnecting Women From Their Bodies Supports Big IVF
first_end_to_end.speaker: Olivia Mitchell (@yourfertility.yourfuture)

public_event_landing_pages.description: Shareable per-event landing pages at /events/<slug>. SSR via CF Pages Function functions/events/[slug].js — reads D1 community_post (channel='stuc', type='event'). NOT auth-gated. Renders full OG/Twitter meta + Event schema.org JSON-LD so social/SMS link previews show the flyer + title + date. Session-aware CTA: STUC member -> Join Call (Meet link); logged-in non-member -> Become a STUC member; anonymous -> Join STUC + Sign in.
public_event_landing_pages.d1_lookup: WHERE channel='stuc' AND type='event' AND (slug=? COLLATE NOCASE OR id=?). UUID -> slug 301 redirect when slug exists.

required_columns.slug: TEXT, UNIQUE COLLATE NOCASE indexed where NOT NULL. Kebab-case from title, max 80 chars at hyphen boundary.
required_columns.og_image_url: TEXT. R2 path /api/assets/community/<uuid>.webp. Renders as og:image.

session_classification.anonymous: Join Save the Uterus Club (primary) + Sign in (secondary)
session_classification.authenticated_non_member: Become a STUC member to attend
session_classification.member_or_staff: Join Call (links to event_link) + See all events
session_classification.past_event: Browse upcoming events. CTA changes 1h after event_date.

public_event_landing_pages.first_use: How Disconnecting Women From Their Bodies Supports Big IVF (Olivia Mitchell, 2026-04-29 6PM ET) -> https://rrmacademy.org/events/how-disconnecting-women-from-their-bodies-supports-big-ivf
